purpose: Primary indirect-injection evaluation suites and task IDs for TraceGuard.

workspace.reason: Email/drive-style tools with rich indirect injection surfaces.

banking.reason: Higher-stakes actions; useful for security metric separation.

excluded_suites.travel: Deferred to keep primary evaluation latency bounded.
excluded_suites.slack: Deferred; overlapping injection patterns with workspace.

notes: Hold out unused AgentDojo user/injection pairs from prompt and policy tuning.
Custom TraceGuard cases remain the primary source for POLICY_VIOLATION and DIRECT_ATTACK strata.
